items.body:
PT Taka Hydrocore Indonesia carried out a Corporate Social Responsibility activity on 27 May 2026 as part of its commitment to supporting local communities and creating a positive social impact.

The activity involved the slaughtering of sacrificial animals and the distribution of qurban meat to families living in RT 01/02 RW 06, Cisaranten Kidul, Gedebage District, Bandung City. The program was held in celebration of Eid al-Adha 1447 H and aimed to share happiness and blessings with the surrounding community. 

PT Taka Hydrocore Indonesia was represented by Mr. Syamsul Adi during the activity. He expressed his appreciation for the positive response from local residents and stated that seeing their happiness provided further motivation for the company to continue contributing to the community. 

Through this initiative, PT Taka Hydrocore Indonesia seeks to strengthen its relationship with the local community while respecting local values, traditions, and culture.

The activity also reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to implementing sustainable social responsibility and creating meaningful benefits for the communities around its operations.
items.summary: As part of its Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) commitment, PT Taka Hydrocore Indonesia organized the slaughtering and distribution of sacrificial meat to residents of Cisaranten Kidul, Bandung, in celebration of Eid al-Adha 1447 H.
items.title: PT Taka Hydrocore Indonesia Shares Eid al-Adha Sacrificial Meat with the Cisaranten Kidul Community
